data_sources.note: Heath is not tagged as a distinct subdivision in the Oregon MLS. SubdivisionName for every Heath address is 'Tetherow'. KPI values reflect the full Tetherow community as the closest verified anchor for a Heath valuation. Footnote in the live market pulse section discloses this constraint.

data_sources.filter: SubdivisionName='Tetherow' AND StandardStatus IN ('Active','ActiveUnderContract','Pending') AND PropertyType='A'
SubdivisionName='Tetherow' AND StandardStatus IN ('Closed','Sold') AND CloseDate >= NOW() - INTERVAL '365 days' AND PropertyType='A'
data_sources.note: Hosmer Lake Dr and Cartwright Dr closings fall within the Heath sub-plat. Other Tetherow sub-plats (Triple Knot, Crescent, etc.) also appear in this filter because the MLS does not separate sub-plat at the SubdivisionName level.

data_sources.filter: geo_slug='tetherow-phase-1' (used as Heath proxy; no Heath-specific polygon registered)
data_sources.polygon_source: Deschutes County GIS Subdivisions (OBJECTID for Tetherow Phase 1)

heath_anchor_used_for_map.note: Tetherow Phase 1 centroid shifted slightly north toward Hosmer Lake Dr where Heath addresses concentrate. No Heath-specific recorded plat exists in Deschutes County GIS.

data_sources.filter: Manual sourced from TOA published assessment schedule
data_sources.note: Annualized total 195*4 + 1464 = 2244 per home, matches the static parent LP table.

data_sources.source: Golf Digest America's 100 Greatest Public Courses 2023-24 ranking

verification.delta: +25 spots from prior list (largest jump on the list)

data_sources.note: Heath row added under Tetherow in this PR. Mirrors HEATH config object in app/lp/tetherow/heath/page.tsx for type-safe server render.

data_sources.filter: cookie rr_agent_attribution -> Matt default if absent
data_sources.note: Per 2026-05-17 Matt directive: all CMA leads route to Matt (FUB user id 1) by default; agent attribution cookie overrides if the visitor came from a per-broker ad URL.

dependencies.parent_route_status: MISSING at PR open time (app/lp/tetherow/page.tsx not yet on main)
dependencies.parent_route_note: Per task brief, a sibling agent is porting the static Tetherow LP to app/lp/tetherow/page.tsx in parallel. Heath links to /lp/tetherow/ in breadcrumb + parent sidebar + buyer cross-link + footer. If the parent route is missing at merge time, those links 404 until the parent PR merges. The Heath page itself renders independent of the parent route.

follow_up_required: Verify the parent Tetherow page route lands at app/lp/tetherow/page.tsx (sibling agent's PR). Once both PRs are merged, the Heath breadcrumb, parent sidebar 'See all Tetherow communities' button, and the '#buyer' deep links all resolve.
Once a per-Heath builder roster is curated, replace the parent-roster placeholder in HEATH.builders with a Heath-specific list.
When Heath gets its own recorded plat polygon registered in the boundaries table, swap the map centroid from the Tetherow Phase 1 proxy to the real Heath centroid.
